# Driveway Gates Kent

> Kent's driveway gate installer matching service. We connect homeowners across Kent with vetted, experienced gate installers, including specialists in coastal corrosion-resistant gates for the county's exposed coastline.

## About

Driveway Gates Kent is a free matching service that connects Kent homeowners with vetted gate installers. Every installer in our network is a gate specialist with a verified project history (50+ completed residential installations), carries public liability cover, and provides written warranties on both the gate and the automation. Homeowners pay nothing to use the service. Installers pay a referral fee only when a job goes ahead.

## Services

- Electric Sliding Gates: /services/electric-sliding-gates/
- Electric Swing Gates: /services/electric-swing-gates/
- Wooden Driveway Gates: /services/wooden-driveway-gates/
- Metal Driveway Gates: /services/metal-driveway-gates/
- Automated Gate Systems: /services/automated-gate-systems/
- Gate Repair and Maintenance: /services/gate-repair-and-maintenance/

## Coverage

We cover all twelve Kent districts: Sevenoaks, Tonbridge and Malling, Tunbridge Wells, Maidstone, Dartford, Gravesham, Canterbury, Swale, Ashford, Folkestone and Hythe, Dover, and Thanet. This includes the West Kent commuter belt (Sevenoaks, Tunbridge Wells), the Kent Downs and High Weald Areas of Outstanding Natural Beauty, and the coast from Whitstable and Herne Bay round through Thanet (Margate, Broadstairs, Ramsgate) to Folkestone, Hythe, and the Romney Marsh edge.

- Location pages: /location/

## Guides and articles

- Blog: /blog/
- Do Metal Driveway Gates Rust by the Sea? Coastal Corrosion Protection in Kent: /blog/coastal-gate-corrosion-protection/
- Planning Permission for Driveway Gates in Kent (AONB, Green Belt, Conservation Areas): /blog/planning-permission-driveway-gates-kent/
- How Much Do Driveway Gates Cost in Kent? 2026 Pricing Guide: /blog/how-much-do-driveway-gates-cost-kent-2026/
- Best Gate Material for Kent: Wood, Steel, or Aluminium?: /blog/best-gate-material-kent-wood-steel-aluminium/
- Driveway Gates in Kent AONB: North Downs and High Weald: /blog/driveway-gates-kent-aonb-high-weald-north-downs/

## Key Facts

- Service area: the county of Kent, all twelve districts
- Installer vetting: gate specialists with a verified project history (50+ completed installations)
- Insurance: public liability cover and written warranties required from every installer
- Coastal specialism: marine-grade aluminium, hot-dip galvanising, A4 stainless fixings, and Accoya for salt-air exposure
- Typical installation: 2 to 4 working days
- Finance: 0% interest-free options available
- Free site surveys with no obligation

## Contact

Website: https://www.drivewaygateskent.co.uk
